title: Premium 28cm Deep Wok - Induction, Dishwasher Safe, Non-Stick, Easy to Clean - PFOA Free, 4mm Thick - Hanging Hook, Suitable for Multiple Hobs - Soft Touch Handle with Flame Retardant Technology
features: * Versatile Cooking: Our 28cm deep wok is perfect for stir-frying, sautéing, deep-frying, and more. It offers ample space for tossing and cooking your favorite dishes with ease.

* Induction Compatible: This wok is designed to work seamlessly with induction cooktops, as well as halogen, gas, and electric hobs. Enjoy its versatility and compatibility across different kitchen setups.
* Non-Stick Coating: The non-stick surface ensures easy food release and simplifies cleaning. No more struggling with stuck-on food or spending excessive time scrubbing.

* Pressed Aluminium Construction: Made from high-quality pressed aluminium, this wok offers excellent heat conduction and durability. Its 4mm thickness provides even heat distribution for perfectly cooked meals.
* Dishwasher Safe and Easy to Clean: Our wok is dishwasher safe, making cleanup a breeze. Spend less time on washing and more time enjoying your culinary creations.

* Hanging Hook and Soft Touch Handle: The wok features a convenient hanging hook for easy storage, saving you valuable kitchen space. The soft touch handle is designed with flame retardant technology, ensuring safe and comfortable handling.
description: Product Description 28cm non stick wok/stir fry pan Box Contains 1 x wok
